title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 03 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 03 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 03 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 03/12/2025
Today, iron ore futures were in the doldrums, with the most-traded contract I2601 closing at 799.5, down 0.19% from theprevious trading day. Traders sold goods following market trends; steel mills purchased as needed. In Shandong, transac on prices for PB fines ranged between 793-800 yuan, holding steady from yesterday's levels; in Hebei, transac on prices for PB fines were between 805-815 yuan/mt.
